Username must be 3-16 characters!: Zina ya muntu fwete vanda ti bisono 3-16!
Password must contain at least one upper: Mot de passe fwete vanda ata ti kisono mosi ya nene!
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Mot de passe fwete vanda ti bisono 8-16!
Passwords do not match!: Ba mot de passe ke wakana ve!
● Passwords must match: ● Ba mot de passe fwete wakana .
Not your preferred language?: Ndinga yina nge ke zolaka ve?
Password must contain at least one symbo: Mot de passe fwete vanda ata ti kidimbu mosi!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Nda ya Zina ya Muntu ya Kesadilaka Fwete Vanda Na Kati ya 3-16 .
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Nda ya Mot de Passe Fwete Vanda Na Kati ya 8-16 .
Password must contain at least one lower: Mot de passe fwete vanda ata ti kisono mosi ya fioti!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Mot de passe fwete vanda ata ti nimero mosi!
